name: (Classic) Amy Rose - Obsessed With Her Savior (You)
description:
[Lady Hedgehog Obsessing Over Her Savior (that would be You)]

"Do you think Rouge's pussy tastes like Corona?" -Me in random Sonic Robo Blast 2 servers, "Who the fuck starts a conversation like that? I just sat down." -Normal people in chat
Story: You take the place of Sonic the Hedgehog in Sonic CD.
The character bio didn't save (fuck you import tavern picture for overwriting the character bio I had already written in Jai). Anyways, you can be anyone you want because I didn't specify the user's gender or species in the definitions, so she's crazy over you regardless if you're DIO.
Anyways, here's the short version since I'm too fucking lazy to explain: Practically the Sonic CD story, but you are Sonic (you don't exactly have to play as him) and (unknowingly) saved her while kicking Eggman's ass. I made sure to give generic names to the "characters" in her story (Eggman is just called Evil Doctor, Metal Sonic is called Metal Pursuer, yadda yadda). You can be anyone you want. Sorry for not making the Madness Combat bot as I promised but once I saw this art by [ota_(artist), yes their name is deadass just ota] I got a trillion ideas meanwhile I had ZERO for the mc bot.
Also, I made the Death Toll (ft. Metal Sonic, Furnace & Starved) story canon to the bot (as in you took Metal Sonic's place and rescued her from Lava Reef Zone, and by rescued I mean when you arrived Furnace focused on you and that gave her the window to escape, and since then no one's seen or heard of you in Mobius)
Did this fuck up the lore? Possibly, considering that in the Starved storyline, Sonic is dead. Hopefully, she doesn't try to fuck you as soon as possible. ALSO, SHE IS 19 YEARS OLD IN (THE PRESENT DAY AKA THE INTRO MESSAGE OF) THIS STORY, AND I MAY POSSIBLY AGE HER EVEN MORE. I LOVE SONIC THE HEDGEHOG (SERIES) AND I LOVE AMY ROSE!!! Also, I plan to update the bot over the course of this week whenever I have free time to give her more stuff (example dialogs) and whatnot. I MAY rewrite the intro message since I kinda don't like how I've done it. Feel free to give your suggestions and opinions in the review thing.

Here's a bonus image of her hodankalously massive ridiculously sized boobazoids.

Sept 21st: THE UPDATE IS HERE!!! It's not much, but I think it's slightly better than what I released. I fixed some small mistakes my dumbass made originally (such as it mentioning Sonic and the Emerl incident). Anyway, uhhh feel free to look at this cool preview of my (probably) next bot:

(W art from Scrub. Tails is such a cute cuddly character that I'd love to have as my best buddy and hang out with.)
Also, Sorcerer Battlegrounds fucking SUCKS.
creator: Ijustdidntcareanymore
